hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM 2 on synthetic liquid-phase TEM video data will produce a segmentation model (SAM-EM) that achieves higher accuracy and real-time tracking performance compared to a U-Net baseline across varying signal-to-noise conditions, because SAM 2's video-object-segmentation architecture and memory mechanisms are better suited to capturing the temporal dynamics of nanoparticle motion in LPTEM than frame-by-frame convolutional approaches.
